extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož attacked inside final km on Cat-1 Alto de Arrate, soloed to win as KUSS destroyed the field with pace-making.
tactical_patterns: KUSS Sepp's sustained tempo on final Cat-1 eliminated contenders before ROGLIČ's attack, winning KOM jersey incidentally through domestique work.
Jumbo-Visma placed five riders in top positions showing depth overwhelmed rivals who lacked collective firepower on mountain stages.
ROGLIČ attacked before technical finish twists, not at steepest gradient, exploiting descending/cornering skills rather than pure climbing.

rider_signals.WOODS Michael: negative: crashed on narrow roads mid-race, eliminated from stage win contention, revealing vulnerability on technical wet descents
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Dani: neutral: crashed early but chased back with teammates waiting, ankle complaint suggested injury management concerns for stage race
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: struggled throughout, couldn't follow on descent, commentary suggests packing it in rather than contending
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: only rider to chase ROGLIČ's attack effectively for second, animated on climbs unlike passive rivals
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: finished strong as last Movistar rider behind KUSS, gained 50-second buffer in young rider classification over nearest rival
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: lost over a minute on hilly stage that commentators considered mountain-level difficulty, age showing early
